subject: Importing Relion4 Refine3D star file to M
body:
Hello!
This is my first message here!
I want to re-process a ribosome SPA dataset in Warp/M. Warp version 1.09 
run quite well so I have all the frames aligned and ready to go. Now, 
starting M I can set up the populations (2 populations as I have to 
datasets) and hashes are generated I think properly. However, when I try to 
define the species corresponding to the Relion4 refine 3D job , I can 
import the half-maps, the mask but once I tried to import the run_data.star 
file, M crashes. Because this is a Relion4 star file, I though that perhaps 
I can remove the first loop of the start file and go back to old relion 
star format. With this modified star file M does work, it does not crashes 
and seems to be looking for the particles but, after a while it can't find 
any particle to map from this species to the populations.
My specific question is, which relion star file format (in the sense of 
which columns and perhaps in which order) is M expecting the run_data.star 
to be? 
Is having x/y coordinates,  micrograph name and the angles enough? 
Additionally, do I need to specify the complete path to the micrograph name 
in my Windows machine in the star file? Perhaps that is the issue?
Thanks!
Israel
